common.restartConfirm: Your current career will be deleted. Are you sure?

teamselect.title: Pick Your Team
teamselect.subtitle: Take charge of one of the 48 nations at the 2026 World Cup

home.eliminated: You were knocked out ({{round}}). You can follow the rest of the tournament.
home.scoutHintFav: You are the favourite — press high and control the tempo.
home.scoutHintUnder: You are the underdog — stay compact and hit on the counter.
home.scoutHintEven: Evenly matched — stay balanced and take your chances.
home.trainingUnavailable: Training is only available on a preparation day.

inbox.welcomeBody: The federation has appointed you head coach of {{team}}. Lead the nation with pride — results will be reviewed after every competition.
inbox.retiredBody: {{player}} has ended their international career. {{caps}} international caps, {{goals}} goals. A tremendous contribution to our team over the years.
inbox.injuryBody: {{player}} picked up an injury and will miss upcoming matches.
inbox.suspOverBody: {{player}}'s suspension is over — he is available again.
inbox.facilityBody: {{facility}} has been added to the federation's facilities.

prep.attackDesc: Attack boost in the next match
prep.defenseDesc: Defence boost in the next match
prep.setpiecesDesc: Small boost to attack and defence

squad.title: Squad
squad.name: Name
squad.estimatedNote: Not found in FC 26 — stats estimated from squad average

youth.noYouth: No youth players yet. They'll appear after retirements and annual aging.
youth.potentialHidden: Scout network needed to see exact potential
youth.retiredBody: {{player}} has ended their international career. {{caps}} caps, {{goals}} goals.
youth.callUpBody: {{player}} has been called up to the senior squad.
youth.callUpFirstBody: 🌟 {{player}} has been called up to the senior squad for the first time!
youth.regenBody: 🌟 {{player}} ({{position}}, {{age}} yrs) has emerged from the youth academy.
youth.readyBody: {{player}} (OVR {{ovr}}) is ready for a senior call-up!
youth.homeReadyNote: is ready for a senior call-up!
youth.eligibleBody: 🌟 {{player}} has turned 16 and can now be called up to the senior squad!

squadSel.title: Squad Selection
squadSel.subtitle: Select 26 players for this competition window

fed.title: Federation
fed.subtitle: Manage your national federation's budget and facilities
fed.youthAcademyDesc: Better & more regens — 2 per retirement, +5 potential
fed.tacticalCenterDesc: Tactical familiarity builds +3 faster per match
fed.fitnessCenterDesc: -15% fatigue, -20% injury risk for all players
fed.scoutingNetDesc: Reveals exact youth potential (instead of stars)
fed.medicalCenterDesc: +30% injury recovery speed, minor injuries heal instantly
fed.stadiumUpgradeDesc: +5 morale per home match, +200K budget per home tournament match

tactics.title: Line-up & Tactics
tactics.pickRoleDesc: Assign a sub-role for this slot
tactics.mDesc_ultra_defensive: Deep block, fast counters — protect the lead or grind a result.
tactics.mDesc_defensive: Stay compact, absorb pressure, strike on the break.
tactics.mDesc_balanced: Equal focus on attack and defence — adapt as the game develops.
tactics.mDesc_attacking: Dominate possession, press high, create chances.
tactics.mDesc_gung_ho: All-out attack — high risk, high reward.
tactics.slider_width_desc: Narrow = solid shape; Wide = more crossing opportunities
tactics.slider_defLine_desc: Deep = safer; High = squeeze opponent build-up
tactics.slider_press_desc: Higher press tires your squad faster
tactics.slider_tempo_desc: Faster play = more chances, more fatigue
tactics.slider_aggression_desc: Hard tackling — increases yellow card risk
tactics.slider_crossing_desc: Exploit the flanks vs central combination play
tactics.slider_counter_desc: Fast transitions vs patient possession build-up
tactics.panenkaNota: Panenka: fixed 82% success rate regardless of GK.
tactics.pressingHintHigh: You are the stronger side — press from the front and dominate possession.
tactics.pressingHintLow: Tougher opposition — stay compact and target fast breaks.
tactics.pressingHintMid: Evenly matched — choose your pressing moments carefully.
tactics.captainBonusNote: Captain OVR≥85 gives +3 morale, ≥75 gives +2, otherwise +1 to the whole squad before kick-off.
tactics.famWarnDanger: ⚠️ This change will cause chaos! Match performance will be severely affected.

match.injuryPrompt: {{player}} is injured! You must make a substitution.

tournament.notYet: This round is not set yet

gradeDesc.F: Disaster — the federation is looking for a new coach.

press_praise.title: Press Praise
press_praise.body: After the win, the press is full of praise. How do you respond?

press_critic.title: Press Criticism
press_critic.body: After the defeat, the papers question your tactics.

star_benched.title: Unhappy Star
star_benched.body: {{player}} is unhappy about being benched and the dressing room is talking.

homesick.title: Homesick
homesick.body: {{player}} misses his family and looks distracted in training.

training_bustup.title: Training Bust-up
training_bustup.body: {{player}} clashed with a teammate in training.

fan_welcome.title: Fan Frenzy
fan_welcome.body: Thousands of fans gather outside the camp to support the team.

minor_knock.title: Minor Knock
minor_knock.body: {{player}} picked up a small knock in training.

media_leak.title: Line-up Leak
media_leak.body: Your starting XI leaked to the press! There's a mole in the camp.

keeper_doubt.title: Keeper Doubts
keeper_doubt.body: {{player}} has lost confidence after recent performances.

youngster_shine.title: Young Talent Shines
youngster_shine.body: {{player}} is impressing everyone in training. The press has noticed.

tactics_doubt.title: Tactical Doubts
tactics_doubt.body: Some players are questioning the game plan.

captain_meeting.title: Captain Requests a Meeting
captain_meeting.body: Morale is low; the captain wants to talk to you.

sponsor_day.title: Sponsor Event
sponsor_day.body: The federation arranged a mandatory sponsor shoot.

illness.title: Illness
illness.body: {{player}} came down with a fever overnight.

old_rival.title: Old Rival Talks
old_rival.body: A former player belittled your team in the press.

menu.subtitle: World Cup Manager
menu.credits:
Built with FIFA API + FC 26 data
48 teams · 26 players each

settings.title: Settings
settings.easyDesc: Opponent strength reduced — great for casual play
settings.normalDesc: Balanced experience for all skill levels
settings.hardDesc: Opponent strength increased · higher board expectations

newgame.stepTournamentSub: Which competition do you want to manage in?
newgame.overwriteConfirm: This slot already has a save. Overwrite?

exp.firedDesc: The board expected more. After a review, they've decided to go in a different direction.
exp.notFiredDesc: The board is satisfied with your performance in this tournament.

goal.v3: {{player}} fires home in the box — GOAL!
goal.v4: What a finish! {{player}} gives the keeper no chance!
goal.v5: {{player}} doesn't waste the opportunity — clean finish, GOAL!
goal.v7: LATE GOAL! {{player}} sends the stadium wild!
goal.v8: A thumping header from {{player}} — it's in!
goal.v9: Breathtaking goal! {{player}} tears the roof off!

goal_late.v0: LATE GOAL! {{player}} sends the crowd into frenzy!
goal_late.v2: Drama at the death — {{player}} with the crucial strike!
goal_late.v3: The drama never ends! {{player}} with a massive goal!
goal_late.v4: {{player}} finishes it off before time runs out — stunning!
goal_late.v6: You couldn't write this script — {{player}} goal!
goal_late.v7: Night belongs to {{player}} — a last-gasp winner!

goal_equalizer.v0: They're back in it! {{player}} makes it level!
goal_equalizer.v1: Equaliser! {{player}} brings them right back into this!
goal_equalizer.v2: {{player}} revives the hope — it's all square!
goal_equalizer.v3: What a comeback! {{player}} draws them level!
goal_equalizer.v5: They refused to die! {{player}} fires them back!
goal_equalizer.v6: The comeback begins — {{player}} takes the first step!
goal_equalizer.v7: Written off but never counted out — {{player}} levels it!

pen_goal.v0: PENALTY SCORED! {{player}} sends the keeper the wrong way!
pen_goal.v3: Perfect penalty from {{player}} — no chance for the keeper!

pen_miss.v1: SAVED! The keeper denies {{player}} from the spot!
pen_miss.v2: Unbelievable, {{player}} fails from the penalty spot!

save.v1: What a stop! {{player}}'s effort is kept out!
save.v2: {{player}} tries his luck but the keeper says no!
save.v4: Reflex stop from the keeper — {{player}} is left frustrated!
save.v5: {{player}}'s effort was heading for the corner — keeper tips it over!
save.v6: Point-blank range and still saved! {{player}} is stunned!
save.v7: Save of the night! Nobody expected {{player}}'s shot to be stopped!

miss.v3: {{player}} blazes it over — what a chance squandered!
miss.v4: The crowd groans — {{player}} failed to hit the target!
miss.v5: Struck firmly by {{player}} but straight at the post!
miss.v6: {{player}} went for power but the effort was off-target!
miss.v7: Chance there, composure wasn't — {{player}} couldn't finish!

red.v1: {{player}} is sent off! Down to ten men!

red_straight.v0: STRAIGHT RED! Violent conduct — {{player}} is off!
red_straight.v1: {{player}} is sent off for a reckless lunge! Down to ten!
red_straight.v2: A horror tackle! {{player}} sees straight red!

red_second_yellow.v1: Two bookings and {{player}} is gone — ten men now.
red_second_yellow.v2: {{player}} picks up a second yellow and walks.

red_dogso.v0: RED! {{player}} denies a clear goal-scoring chance!
red_dogso.v1: Last-ditch foul! {{player}} is sent off for the professional foul.
red_dogso.v2: {{player}} hauls down the striker — it's a red!

red_dissent.v0: Sent off for dissent! {{player}} loses his head.
red_dissent.v1: {{player}} argues once too often and is shown red!

gk_field.v1: No keeper left — {{player}} pulls on the gloves!

injury.v0: {{player}} is down, medics on the pitch.
injury.v2: {{player}} is in pain — this looks bad.
injury.v4: Concerning scenes — {{player}} can't get to his feet.

halftime.v1: That's the end of the first half.

et_start.v0: Level after 90 — we're going to EXTRA TIME!
et_start.v1: 90 minutes couldn't separate them, extra time it is!

shootout.v0: It all comes down to this: PENALTIES!

big_chance_miss.v1: So close! {{player}} can't believe it — a golden opportunity gone!

wonder_shot.v0: {{player}} tries his luck from his own half — audacious!
wonder_shot.v1: What a cheeky attempt from {{player}} near the halfway line!

crowd_roar.v0: The crowd is electric — the atmosphere is building!
crowd_roar.v1: The stands are rocking as the pressure mounts!

goal_wonder.v0: UNBELIEVABLE! {{player}} scores from the halfway line with a wonder goal!
goal_wonder.v1: A WONDER GOAL! {{player}} fires home from his own half — this is extraordinary!

offside.v0: Offside! The attack is cancelled — flag is up.
offside.v1: VAR confirms it: offside position, goal ruled out.
offside.v2: A fine margin — the linesman gets it right.
offside.v3: The attack is cut short — offside flag raised!
offside.v4: The offside trap worked to perfection!

foul_minor.v1: A hard challenge — referee blows the whistle.
foul_minor.v3: The battle heats up — referee steps in.

foul_dangerous.v0: DANGEROUS FOUL! Free kick in a threatening position!
foul_dangerous.v1: Foul near the box — this is a danger zone set piece!
foul_dangerous.v2: Direct shooting range free kick awarded!
foul_dangerous.v3: Critical area foul — keeper organises the wall!

free_kick.v2: Play stops — free kick to be taken.
free_kick.v3: Ball is down, set piece time.

free_kick_goal.v0: FREE KICK GOAL! {{player}} curls it over the wall!
free_kick_goal.v2: GOAL from the free kick! {{player}} finds the net!
free_kick_goal.v3: What a free kick from {{player}} — absolute beauty!

free_kick_saved.v0: Free kick saved! The keeper pulls off a great stop.
free_kick_saved.v2: Good attempt, great save — no goal.

weather_effect.v0: The rain is lashing down — the ball is skidding on the surface!
weather_effect.v1: Tough conditions affecting both sides out there.
weather_effect.v2: The humidity is sapping energy — this pitch is draining.

pool.hint: Tap a player to call them up, then select them for your 26-man squad.
pool.callUpBody: {{player}} has been called up from the extended pool.

squadLock.title: Player Pool
squadLock.confirmBody: This squad cannot be changed until {{tournament}} ends. Are you sure?
